description: Very damaged and faded page, probably from a court record, regarding betrothal. From the various signatures preserved we can assume it was written between 1092-1132. Signed by Avraham b. Shema'aya ha-Haver, Shemuel b. Shemarya and Yefet. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
